tasks.engine:build: swift build --product blitz3d-engine --swift-sdk swift-wasm-6.2-RELEASE-wasm32-unknown-wasip1 --triple wasm32-unknown-wasip1 -Xlinker --export-all -Xlinker --no-entry -Xswiftc -enable-experimental-feature -Xswiftc Extern -c release && cp .build/wasm32-unknown-wasip1/release/blitz3d-engine.wasm dist/engine.wasm
tasks.test:web:build: cd web && deno task build && deno run -A Tools/validate_no_source_models.ts --ban b3d,x,rmesh dist dist/scpcb_manifest.json && deno run -A Tools/validate_manifest_files.ts dist dist/scpcb_manifest.json && deno run -A Tools/validate_smpk_material_textures.ts dist && deno task dist:report
tasks.test:all: deno task test:swift && deno task test:deno && deno task test:web:build && deno task test:wasm && deno task engine:build
tasks.web:setup: cd web && deno task setup && deno task setup:assets
tasks.docs:runtime: deno doc --private web/src/runtime/core.ts web/src/runtime/fileio.ts web/src/runtime/graphics/index.ts web/src/runtime/graphics/types.ts web/src/runtime/globals.ts web/src/shared/wasm_imports.ts
tasks.docs:runtime:html: deno doc --html --name="Blitz3D-WASM Runtime" --output=docs/generated/runtime --private web/src/runtime/core.ts web/src/runtime/fileio.ts web/src/runtime/graphics/index.ts web/src/runtime/graphics/types.ts web/src/runtime/globals.ts web/src/shared/wasm_imports.ts
tasks.deploy:staging: deno task assets:scpcb:convert && deno task test:web:build
